name: bb-browser
description: Turn your authenticated browser into an API for AI agents — 103 commands across 36 platforms, no API keys needed.

commands.name: site
commands.description: Run a curated platform command (e.g. twitter/search, arxiv/search)

commands.name: snapshot
commands.description: Get the accessibility tree of the current page

commands.name: click
commands.description: Click an element by accessibility index

commands.name: eval
commands.description: Execute JavaScript in the current page

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Capture a screenshot of the current page

use_cases: Multi-platform research using authenticated browser sessions
Access real-time data from sites without official APIs
Browser automation with accessibility tree navigation
